texto: [Looking like a straight girl] means wearing clothes that seek and destroy comfort. These are garments designed by gay men to attract heterosexual men. The straight girl is simply the hanger for an inside joke.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Mary Dugger: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a humor. O trecho “[Looking like a straight girl] means wearing clothes that seek and destroy comfort. These are gar…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que humor, fashion, lesbian pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de humor e lesbian.
